idea-plugin.name: Spring Config Table
idea-plugin.description:
Manage Spring Boot multi-environment YAML config files using a single Markdown table.

  • Visual Table Editor — Master-Detail layout with grouped property list, search filter, and inline editing for all environments
  • YAML Lens — View multiple YAML/Markdown files as a searchable property table with CSV export and precise source navigation
  • YAML ↔ Markdown Migration — Convert existing YAML files to master Markdown (with comments) and back
  • Auto-Generation — Automatically regenerates per-environment YAML files when the master Markdown changes
  • Spring Metadata — Type detection and auto-completion from spring-configuration-metadata.json
  • Comment Round-Trip — YAML inline comments preserved as HTML comments in Markdown
  • Shareable Config — Environment sort order in .sct-config.yml for team sharing via Git
  • Multi-Module — Configure different master files and output paths per module
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.2.2

  • Support IntelliJ IDEA 2026.1 (build 261)
  • Fix VFS refresh threading issue on 2026.1+ (wrap in WriteAction for EDT compatibility)
  • Replace experimental WriteIntentReadAction with stable WriteAction API

1.2.0

  • Shareable config: .sct-config.yml in project root for Git-based team sharing of environment sort order (replaces embedded <!-- sct-config -->)
  • Fix deprecated API usages (FileSaverDescriptor, Project.getBaseDir)

1.1.0

  • YAML Lens: precise double-click navigation using SnakeYAML Node API (fixes wrong line when duplicate key names exist)
  • Migration: file save dialog now defaults to project root directory
  • Settings: hint that embedded config in master file takes precedence over IDE settings

1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Visual table editor with Master-Detail layout
  • YAML Lens viewer with search, filter, natural sort
  • YAML ↔ Markdown migration with comments
  • Spring Boot metadata integration
  • Configurable environment sorting (lifecycle × region)
  • Auto-generation with debounce
  • Multi-module support
  • i18n: English + Korean
